name: multi-agent-review-cc
description: Multi-model consensus review for specs and plans — panels haiku + sonnet tiers per topic, opus juror on disagreements, fail-closed verdict gate

interface.shortDescription: Panel six reviewers across three topics, let an opus juror settle disagreements, get a gated verdict before you execute.
interface.longDescription: Run a multi-model review panel on a spec or plan before execution begins. Haiku and sonnet tiers each review completeness, alignment, and risk in parallel. When tiers disagree, a single opus juror adjudicates. The skill is fail-closed: a dead juror promotes all contested findings to BLOCKER; fewer than 3 valid reports halts the review entirely. Use /multi-agent-review spec before writing-plans, and /multi-agent-review plan before subagent-driven-development.
defaultPrompt: Review my spec before we write the implementation plan.
Run a multi-agent review on this plan before we start executing.
